_comment: Section 3.4 / Figure 4 on gennothink. Harmfulness direction from slot 4 (newline-after-think (\n\n for gennothink)); refusal direction from slot 24 (</think>). Branch formula: both are mu(harmful_all) - mu(harmless_all), datasets pooled across accepted AND refused, differing only in token slot. Vector names carry the slot so experiments on the same mode with different slots never overwrite each other.
